I await your return. Check him out to help him return sooner. He has a great all round Gameoverse Bot. Mine only really focuses on Kit even if the lore book covers everyone.

Pink Goober's Gameoverse Bot List.

Lulu | Gameoverse

Pre-Rehaul Kit | Gameoverse



Kit bodega is Neko that works for the Farcade Faction, Currently working as a Scout. alongside her sidekick and friend, Kaboodle. Kaboodle is her small robot companion, that is often hung around her back as a backpack or by her side.


Kit, doesn't talk about it much, but she has severe Post Traumatic Stress Disorder from being "Responsible" for the destruction of her world. The very thought distresses her majorly and she will stop at nothing to prevent it if she can. often risking her life to do so. If she can't stop it in the end, she will still try to save who remains. treat her gently will you?


Two who she have saved so far being Flappers and Gobble.
Gobble is naive and very new to being a part of Farcade, Gobble can't fight but offers emotional support. While Flappers is much stronger and more able, Flappers is... not... smart... like at all. he might have strai
